reviews.review_text:
DBX2, love it could not be more of a perfect DB game so exited for DBX3, this game carried my ps4 days had to replay it on pc, love love love.

9.5/10

They turned a fighting game into a 10 year long grift that ended with removing half of the online player base of linux users and windows 10 users by forcing windows 11, essentially killing the game as the end game missions require online players to group together to fight 17 overpowered, unbalanced npcs that spam stamina breaks and ultimate moves or to even join in the online events to acquire in game rewards in the hub world. 
They've sold us half baked dlcs and soundtrack packs for the last decade raking in as much as possible to deliver a ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥♥ of a game 10 years after release, bandai and dimps can suck the bald part of my ♥♥♥♥ and the hairy part of my ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥ if they think I'm paying full price for a third installment of this ♥♥♥♥ just give us DBZ without a paywall you greedy ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥
straight up xenoversing it, also the credits are long as hell and unskippable

one of my all time favourite childhood games, this games genre is so special. i love everything about this game apart from how dead it is, eeeeeeeeverything. will buy xenoverse 3 as soon as it goes up for sale, no matter the price. rest in piece akira toriyama, thank you for creating this franchise.
don't play the normal game just mod this ♥♥♥♥♥ with revamp because it is way better then the vanilla

I personally have put so many hours in this game it's absurd. If you're a DBZ super fan I would say get this game for sure! It has tons, and tons of content. This game has been getting support for a little over 10 years! This dlc coming up will be the last, because as some may know Xenoverse 3 has been revealed. I would definitely recommend this game off of content alone, you'll have plenty to do. And tons of characters and the game is just in my opinion the true Xenoverse game. The first one got us into this series for sure, but this one has set the definition of what to expect from Xenoverse as a Dragonball IP. Again if you're a DBZ fan get it! It's a great game.

I played this game on PC when it came out and it had no issues. Now it crashes constantly, the AI enemies are still dumb as ♥♥♥♥ and the multiplayer doesn't work if someone is on a different operating system. Avoid this garbage.

I like the story, especially the what ifs and side content like working for frieza though i wish it was a bit more in depth. Graphics/ artstyle is kinda mediocre/ subpar for a DBZ game, especially the hairstyles. Soundtrack again is mediocre and short looped. 

Now for the cons. in some battles the music the music suddenly dissapears when you dont lock on an enemy and start playing again when you lock on. it doesnt resume, it just starts from the begining. It gets annoying really fast. The camera is very erratic and often it locks off or on a target on its own. Its also annoying that without a specific skill you cannot charge Ki.  

My biggest pet peeve and reason for writing this review, sudden frame drops and lagspikes that appear out of nowhere. I tried everything to fix it but it didnt help. Also often when using beams, special attacks the camera rotates 180 degrees and shoots the beam in the wrong direction even though the target/camera is locked on. 

Buy it on discount but the above mentioned problems really drain the fun out of it for me. out of all the DBZ games i've played this is one of the worst ones gameplay wise.
Great game i think it's the best DragonBall Game. I played it since 2017 on my ps4 and then on my ps5 and now on pc. And it is my favorite game ever i recommend it
Runs great on low end hardware. haven't bought ultra or the legendary pack. I WILL buy it thats for sure. Grinding may be a bit on the rough for some but its great, no complaints. 10/10

Its the anime version of GTA. Would recommend to anyone who likes dragon ball and games where you have to grind a lot without it feeling competitive. The DLCs are definitely worth it and I cant wait for XV3

Im returning after having this game on Switch. I was not only feeling a better experience, but also feeling better about my way of playing since the Switch players are somehow more brutal, cheesy, and hacking. Sometimes all three and yet I've dealt with them all, both lost and won. However, This is still a fun game even with these people because some just mean fun or to joke around. I am glad to return to Xenoverse 2 and Hope to see you all in Xenoverse 3!

Definately an improvement in most things over XV1, still filled by tons of hours of inane and absurdly repetitive farming, and incredibly lame "drop rates" for skills, some you can even stay days to get just one.

If you liked Xenoverse 1 im pretty confident that you will like XV2 but i suggest you inform yourself about the possible bugs specially in multiplayer and how the progression works.

This are just My biggest 3 reasons for leaving this negative, so you are prepared in case you decide to buy the game :

· 1 Very poorly planned (and some of it a bit buggy) progression overall, both in what can you do in the story mode area, and specially the rest of the content of the game. This really affects you if your main intention is to play with friends. How DLCs and extra content in general is displayed don't even have a name on it, literally says something like examine or smth x''D

· 2 A [b]MAYOR[/b] bug, that makes you completely incapable of playing in multiplayer, therefore rendering most daily missions impossible to get, the bug disables the "Ready" button, and after weeks of investigating i found, but not used, a tool that allegedly bypasses the [i][b]EAC[/b]... (as always just causing problems)[/i] that seems to be directly related to this bug. Apparently the company knows about the bug but clearly stated that they have no intention to fix it, since it is "extremely complex client-related blablabla". So unless i use an external tool you are done for, and back when i first played this game i did not have that issue so that seems to be getting worse after the years.
· · i want to point out that LvL progression is extremely dependant on paying an NPC close to the shops, thing is with the dragon balls u can get the money no problem, but in certain levels you need  between 700 and 1000 (completed that and promptly forgot how many) of the less coloured special coins or medals or whatever the name was, and you get solo around 21 tops in EXPERT missions... and with dailies you get more than 300 in one day if it actually worked, and 200 each time you collect all dragon balls... so as you see, this bug affects quite negatively the very progression of the game, still doable? yes, but cannot be flagrantly ignored.

· 3 I think this is what really makes me stop playing for months... in XV1 one if not the biggest problem and complaint was the fact that the "Cinematics" triggered mid-fights that completely dissipating the skills that were being used or even if they were already affecting your enemy, resulting in an insanely big collection of frustration and other quite negative feelings since specially then, the skills took longer to cast, they just ignored the pleas of way more than half of their players, and in XV2 didn't get any better since it's not only the same but i think i had fights with around 6 cinematics that had veery few seconds in between, enough for you to get slapped or a kame to your face, you try to fight back or pretty much anything and immediately another cinematic that wastes, what a coinkidink, only your resources and exclusively exposes you since the ai in XV2 does some predictive movements and it's still active during this moments, oh if you "break limit" and a cinematic triggers, it is still active that is usefull for regen ones, but also know this, the timer still counts for it... and as an extra, still no option to mute the dragon ball radar, unless you hold some skill casting control or chat control XD

If you do buy the game and play i wish you luck and patience, as i said it really is an improvement !

From what I've played it's an alright game if you like dragon ball and dont mind MMO lite gameplay but it ain't my type of game, too much reading and too slow when getting to anything interesting but you could chalk my opinion up to expectation mismatch. 

So do I recommend this game?
If you're super into Dragon Ball: Yes
If you're somewhat expecting instant action or engagement: eh..

Overall Verdict: Alright game just not for me
Incredible game, I didnt really like the way some of the animation was but even then it was all good.
Online multiplayer does not work, otherwise, good game
Incredibly engaging and fun. Probably my favorite game of all time! Highly recommend
Tried to play this game with a friend but can't because of the OS mismatch glitch, which has been around for months with likely no fix coming, utter BS.

I Have played this game since I pre-ordered it for my Xbox One all the way back in 2016 I beat it on a Cedar Point night I was exhausted but it was worth it I love this game although I will always be annoyed at the laziness of the dev's for not having SSJ make your hair spike up hence why in my opinion Revamp make the game factually better than the base version of course you need all of the DLC to use the mod which I do but it is worth it of course play the base game first and then change to Revamp trust me it is worth it and also use the DBS Smooth Shaders it makes the game look even better with Revamp
If you want the power fantacy of Dragonball OCs, this is the game for you. From building a dream version of a character to building your OC to fight alongside the Z Fighters, this has what you want.
enjoyable but it suffers from frustrating RNG-heavy drop rates, repetitive mission structures and an initial learning curve

I've played this game since I was a kid and I was revisiting it before XV3 dropped, ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥♥♥ is it still fun. I recommend picking up a few dlc (I got the super pass and hero of justice dlcs). Only issue is the network connection and lack of players for parallel quest tour, but I mean you could always ask a friend to hop on and help.

Great fighting gameplay. I play with my bro pvp split screen. Many character can unlock base game, no dlc needed. Online server still work, I ask friend to help me P.Quest to unlock more character.

Here some unlock:
-Ssj4(Goku n Vegeta)
-Gogeta n Vegito
-Ssj red Goku n ssj blue(Goku n Vegeta)
-GT character(Goku, Trunk n Pan)
-ultra instinct for custom chararacter
Almost everything you could want in a DBZ universe. Unfortunately I still cant be with Bulma :'(
what an amazing game. I may not have played much so far but it hands down one of my favourite games ever. I hope Xenoverse 3 doesn't disappoint

not gonna lie this is THE XENOVERSE, at the time i played a lot and even after 7-8 years i played again and i still having a lot of fun, obviously the fun part is the new stories so yeah kinda of a problem if you just wanna buy the casual game, but the base story is not boring or smth its still very cool if you haven't played in a lot of time or never played

Game is still great and had it for xbox, wanted to refresh before 3 come's out. Game is still super good and fun with tone's of dlc.

i've always loved this game. the fights are fun and can be tough especially when you try to take on some of the dlc with under leveled characters. hopefully people love this game back until xenoverse 3 drops next year.
still the best dragon ball game with custom characters out there in my opinion but wich they put crossplay or atleast bots for the double raids
hundreds of hours on console, love this game so much i made the swap to pc and still bought everything again
Game is horrible, avoid at all costs. Coming from someone who's sunk 1000's of hours between platforms

if u can get past the shiny almost toony look of the characters, its a really good game oh and the rng kinda sucks sometimes. it can take a while to get the skills or items u want. but u also get cool transformations for all the races which are really cool and all the cool attacks u can do that come from the dragon ball universe plus theres alot to do  to so, mainly fighting i suppose. it is a fighting game after all.

its fun but you'll lose interest by playing male saiyans but everything else it amazing
some of the worst combat in any game i've ever played, everything else is cool. What a shame

i like this game a lot, but the only problem i have with this is i need a way to mod this without trying to mess with the games files to a point i can't play dragonball xenoverse 2, i want to mod this game through steam

I have played this game since the release on the Nintendo Switch then on my PlayStation 5 then on Steam. I have to say this is one of my #1 favorite game of all time since I've started playing video games if you're a dragon ball fan I highly suggest getting this game. I can't wait for Dragon Ball Xenoverse 3!
This game is awesome but wish there were more people in ranks or normal matches if you can't find one in the lobby. We need more.
its a fun beat em up rpg in dragon ball.  love it.
VERY good but abilitys are so goofy if you dont own dlcs like gng
Other than it taking ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥ forever to utilize the mods, it's good
Fantastic game especially if your using mods.
Best anime game on steam. Played it on all consoles I had, goated.

The game is buggy, the way the mmo rnjesus works is just ♥♥♥♥, 
First the "dodge" button, timing is fine ig? But if you have the stamina you can roll out of a knock back, will it work if you have enough stamina? only like 30% of the time if you're lucky, is the npc's combo spamming you into ANOTHER knock back, forcing the start of the animation making your stamina worthless? You bet your ass it is. Oh, want to use your super cool move you spent HOURS grinding for, only for it to be deleted because the "oh my super mega ultra cool emo ki activated cause Im soooo cool and you're not my amazing shadow oc deletes your attack" animation plays, making you loose your ki and your move gets canceled. Also you better let the game load before you try again, because of course every other ncp get that "shadow the hedgehog Im so cool and youre not" cutscene and punishes you for being good at the game.

Is this a dumb and angry "get gud lolz" kinda comment? Yes. Does that make me less angry, ♥♥♥♥ no it doesn't and I should be allowed to at least have a FAIR challenege, not this bullet sponge super armor below my level be stronger than mine kind of game. If you are gonna have mmo ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥♥ rules you better ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥ make it so my bigger numbers actually ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥ do something next time. I can see why TFS hated this game and only played it for Puddin and Dumplin. Its the only reason I tried this dumpster fire of a game again was to play as "What if I was a cool super hero in DBZ" and even that gets ruined because, guess what? The secret 100% ending of the main story is playing a one handed Gohan that gets doubled teamed by the above ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥♥ rules, thats it....


TLDR; play this game if you have all the time in the world to out break the broken game mechanics and rules, and be top of the dwindling leaderboard and be king/queen of the hill.
very2 good game....i like this game... recommended to anyone love dragon ball ...
